rows.label: qev085305_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh, Old Man, you were safe.
Did you manage to get the Flemtide?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0002
rows.name: Old Man?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0003
rows.name:
Of course I did!
Who do you think I am?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0004
rows.name: Leaving the old man to you guys was the right call.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0004_2
rows.name: Old Man, let's go drink some beer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0005
rows.name: Yeah, let's go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0006
rows.name:
Ah, oi!
Wait a minute![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0007
rows.name:
Cole Family Precept Number One:
Nothing beats a beer after work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0008
rows.name:
That's not it!
Just now, you called Libro "Old Man"—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0009
rows.name:
Yeah, I said that, but—
is there something wrong with that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0010
rows.name:
No, because—
Isn't Libro-san the son—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0011
rows.name:
Weren't you told about us
by Commander Vandham?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0012
rows.name:
I see.
This is what he meant by them being eccentric.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0013
rows.name: Vandham can be quite malicious too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0014
rows.name:
What in the world is going on mo?
Tatsu doesn't understand at all mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0015
rows.name:
Libro Cole.
You're actually over eighty years old, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0016
rows.name: What are you saying? I'm still in my seventies![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0017
rows.name: Eeh?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0018
rows.name: We're talking about the inside.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0019
rows.name:
He threw a tantrum saying he wouldn't board the White Whale
unless they gave him a young [System:Ruby rt=Blue Blood ]B.B.[/System:Ruby].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0020
rows.name:
What are you saying?
I just received a body suitable for my mental age.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0021
rows.name: Now, let's go quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0022
rows.name: Sure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0023
rows.name:
Elma-san.
My head is a complete mess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_JNK0010
rows.name: Confidence

rows.label: qev085305_SEL0011
rows.name: State that Libro is the son and Kias is the father.

rows.label: qev085305_JNK0020
rows.name: Certainty

rows.label: qev085305_SEL0021
rows.name: State that Kias is the son and Libro is the father.

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0024
rows.name:
It seems you're a mess too.
Libro is the father and Kias is the son.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0025
rows.name: You were so confident but you got it wrong mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0025_m
rows.name: You were so confident but you got it wrong mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0025_f
rows.name: You were so confident but you got it wrong mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0026
rows.name: Correct. Kias is the son and Libro is the father.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0027
rows.name:
I understand that too, but...
it just doesn't feel right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0028
rows.name:
Still, their appearances are strange, but
their personalities were eccentric too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0029
rows.name: You're right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0030
rows.name:
Even though Libro-san was left behind by his son,
he didn't seem to mind at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0031
rows.name: It felt rather normal for them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0032
rows.name:
To carry out a mission
even if one ends up alone—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0033
rows.name: You could call it a model for a BLADE member, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0034
rows.name:
To be able to compartmentalize things to that extent
even though they are family, just because it's a mission—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0035
rows.name: I wonder if it's right to call it amazing—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085305_MSG0036
rows.name:
I don't think I'll ever be able to understand
that parent and child for the rest of my life.[ST:wait ]
